name: thickness
description: Line thickness — number (px) or any CSS length.

name: color
description: Palette name or hex / `rgb(...)` / `r,g,b`. Defaults to a subtle `--text` mix.

name: inset
description: Leading inset gutter — `true` = 1.5rem, or any CSS length.

name: labelPlacement
description: Where the label sits along the line. Ignored when there is no label.

name: children
description: Optional label snippet. Renders the divider with a centred / inline cap.
